---
name: Technical debt item
about: Record a piece of technical debt for the debt register
title: 'Debt: <short summary>'
labels: ['tech-debt']
---

<!--
  Use this to record technical debt. Accepted items are added to
  docs/technical-debt/technical-debt-register.md. See
  docs/governance/technical-debt-governance.md.
-->

## Description

<!-- What the debt is, and why it exists (a deliberate trade, or drift). -->

## Class

<!-- architectural | runtime | event/contract | observability | resilience |
     security | testing | process -->

## Severity

<!-- P0 stop-the-line | P1 gates the next phase | P2 important | P3 cleanup -->

## Owner

<!-- The agent or role accountable for the fix (ADR 0034). -->

## Recommended fix

<!-- The fix, or the ADR the fix requires. -->

## Expiry

<!-- Date or phase by which this is fixed or re-evaluated. P1/P2 require one. -->
